---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: ["enhancement"]
assignees: []
---

## Problem

What's the gap you're hitting today? (Be concrete — "support form X", "new
column Y in the holdings schema", etc.)

## Proposed change

What should the library do instead? If it touches the public API, sketch
the signature.

## Alternatives considered

What workarounds have you tried or considered?

## Additional context

Links to the relevant SEC documentation, sample filings, or prior art in
other libraries.
